title: Ubiquiti UACC-Camera-DM-W - Dual Mount camera mounting bracket for UVC-G4/G5/AI cameras, white
description: The UACC-Camera-DM-W is a durable mounting bracket designed for a pair of cameras from Ubiquiti UniFi. It supports installation on a wall, pole, or the option to mount on a 1 1/2" NPS threaded pipe (included in the package) UVC-G3-Pro UVC-G4-Pro UVC-G5-Pro UVC-G3-Bullet UVC-G4-Bullet UVC-G5-Bullet UVC-AI-Bullet UVC-AI-DSLR UVC-AI-Pro UVC-AI-Turret UVC-AI-Dome UVC-G5-Turret-Ultra UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra
